articles.author: Anthony Faiola, Stefano Pitrelli
articles.title: On July Fourth, Pope Leo urges U.S. to welcome, protect and assist immigrants - The Washington Post
articles.description: In Lampedusa, island gateway to Europe, the U.S.-born pope stressed human dignity and told America: « in every generation » immigrants "helped to shape the nation’s character.”
articles.content: LAMPEDUSA, Italy Pope Leo XIV on Saturday defended the dignity of migrants during a visit to the Italian island of Lampedusa, where the Mediterranean waters beckon as a pathway of hope to a better li… [+69 chars]

articles.author: Sophia Barnes
articles.title: Masked men with Confederate flags seen chanting, marching, riding Metro in DC - NBC4 Washington
articles.description: Videos show masked men marching and chanting “Reclaim America” in Washington, D.C., on July 4. Some flags appeared to depict the Patriot Front logo.
articles.content:
Masked men, some carrying Confederate flags, were seen marching in Washington, D.C., on the Fourth of July.
Reclaim America, reclaim America, the crowd was heard chanting in a video captured near Un… [+934 chars]

articles.author: Tamara Keith
articles.title: 'Cautiously optimistic': Swing voters describe their view of America at 250 - NPR
articles.description: As America turns 250, voters from our Swing Shift project talk about the state of the country. Their views ranged from "uncertain" and  "concerned" to "excited" and "cautiously optimistic."
articles.content:
